intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再按中文电影线记忆：牙医刚拔完牙、嘴里塞满 cotton wool、牙医问收藏和家人工作、病人只能点头或发怪声、Meanwhile 切到舌头找牙洞、最后发现拔错牙。读的时候保持轻微着急和喜剧感，不要读成恐怖故事。

sentences.text: Dentists always ask questions when it is impossible for you to answer.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：牙医总在你无法回答时问问题。Dentists always ask questions 是吐槽式开头，when it is impossible 要连成一个条件场景。

sentences.text: My dentist had just pulled out one of my teeth and had told me to rest for a while.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：牙医刚拔完一颗牙，并让我休息一会儿。had just pulled out 和 had told me 是过去完成时，说明动作已经发生。

sentences.text: I tried to say something, but my mouth was full of cotton wool.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：我想说话，但嘴里塞满药棉。tried to say something 后面要读出 but 的转折，cotton wool 是这课的关键原因。

sentences.text: He knew I collected match boxes and asked me whether my collection was growing. He then asked me how my brother was and whether I liked my new job in London.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：牙医问火柴盒收藏、哥哥和伦敦新工作。whether my collection was growing、how my brother was、whether I liked... 都是间接问题。

sentences.text: In answer to these questions I either nodded or made strange noises.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：对这些问题，我不是点头，就是发出奇怪声音。either...or... 表示两个选择，nodded 和 made strange noises 要分清。

sentences.text: Meanwhile, my tongue was busy searching out the hole where the tooth had been.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：与此同时，舌头在忙着找牙洞。Meanwhile 后稍微停一下，让外线闲聊切到内线警报；searching out 是仔细找。

sentences.text: I suddenly felt very worried, but could not say anything.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：我突然很担心，却什么也说不出来。suddenly felt very worried 读出突然的紧张，but could not say anything 是无奈。

sentences.text: When the dentist at last removed the cotton wool from my mouth, I was able to tell him that he had pulled out the wrong tooth.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：牙医终于取出药棉，我才能说他拔错了牙。at last 和 was able to 表示终于能说，had pulled out the wrong tooth 是最后笑点。
